name: race-engineer
description: Race-Engineer desktop app for iRacing telemetry
author: InfiNxt

scripts.test: python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" && node --test tests/*.js
scripts.lint: python -m ruff check race_engineer tests scripts && eslint electron web tests
scripts.format:check: python -m ruff format --check tests/test_server_security.py && prettier --check eslint.config.js web/ui-utils.js tests/test_ui_security.js package.json
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
